acquisition method: The Orbitrap Fusion was operated in 3 s “top speed” DDA under FT-IT mode
alkylation reagent: alkylation with 50 mM iodoacetamide for 45 min at room temperature in the dark
alkylation concentration: alkylation with 50 mM iodoacetamide for 45 min at room temperature in the dark
cleavage agent: Digestion was performed with 25 μL AspN at 80 ng/μL
collision energy: above a threshold ion count of 10,000 and normalized collision energy of 30%
enrichment method: incubated with 200 μL anti-Flaga® M2 affinity gel
fragmentation method: followed by 3-s “Top Speed” data-dependent CID ion trap MS/MS scans
instrument: using an Orbitrap Fusion™ Tribrid™ mass spectrometer
ionization type: equipped with a nanospray Flex Ion Source
labeling: we performed SILAC (stable isotope labeling in cell culture) proteomics analysis
reduction reagent: 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) were reduced for 1 h at 34°C
reduction concentration: 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) were reduced for 1 h at 34°C
